name: Arjun Sharma
bio: Roommate from sophomore year. We used to go trekking in the Western Ghats every other weekend.

name: Sarah Jenkins
bio: Former manager who taught me everything about project management. Great at giving career advice.

name: Elena Rodriguez
bio: Lived next door for 10 years. Both share a passion for street photography and vintage cameras.

name: Marcus Thorne
bio: Met at the local CrossFit box. He keeps me accountable on leg days and heavy lifting sessions.

name: Chloe Chen
bio: Met while backpacking through Southeast Asia. She's an incredible watercolor artist based in Seattle.

name: David Miller
bio: Met during a 48-hour hackathon. We still play co-op strategy games on Friday nights.

name: Priya Patel
bio: Current neighbor who introduced me to meditation. We usually grab coffee after Sunday morning yoga.

name: Julian Voss
bio: A local historian I met at the library. We trade recommendations for non-fiction biographies.

name: Samira Khan
bio: Best friend from high school. She's now a sous-chef and sends me the best sourdough recipes.

name: Liam O'Connor
bio: Guitarist in a local band. We always share new indie playlists and go to underground gigs.

name: Naomi Watanabe
bio: Study abroad partner in Tokyo. We try to have a video call once a season to practice Japanese/English.

name: Ben Thompson
bio: Coordinates the local food bank. We met while organizing a community cleanup last summer.
